title: CVE-2025-3248
abstract: Langflow contains a missing authentication vulnerability in the /api/v1/validate/code endpoint that allows a remote, unauthenticated attacker to execute arbitrary code via crafted HTTP requests.

title: CVE-2026-33017
abstract: Langflow contains a code injection vulnerability that could allow building public flows without requiring authentication.
